project.name: SnapLink
project.description: URL shortener with click analytics. Users create short links and track clicks (geo, device, referrer) in real time. Public redirect endpoint runs at Cloudflare edge — zero cold start, global low latency.
project.frontendStack: React + Vite (SPA, hosted on Cloudflare Pages)
project.backendStackPreference: Hono + Cloudflare Workers + D1 + KV + Queues
project.notes: Redirect endpoint (GET /:code) is the hot path — must be < 10ms. KV stores code→URL mapping (TTL 1h). D1 (SQLite at edge) for persistent data. CF Queue for fire-and-forget click analytics. Rate limiting via Upstash REST API (no TCP Redis in Workers). No Docker — deployed via wrangler.

pages.name: Landing
pages.purpose: Hero section with guest URL shortener. Paste a long URL, get a short link instantly (no auth required). Shows example shortened links and feature highlights.

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.purpose: Overview for authenticated users: KPI cards (total links, total clicks today / this week / all time), sparkline chart of clicks last 14 days, top 5 links by clicks.
emptyStates: no links yet — create your first short link

pages.name: Links
pages.purpose: Full link management: table of all user links (short URL, destination, click count, status), create new link (with optional custom slug and UTM builder), toggle active, edit, delete.
emptyStates: no links yet — create your first

pages.name: Analytics
pages.purpose: Detailed analytics: click time series (daily/weekly/monthly toggle), geographic breakdown by country (bar chart), device type breakdown, top referrers table, date range picker.
emptyStates: no click data in selected period

pages.name: Settings
pages.purpose: Account settings: update display name and email, change password, view account tier (free / pro), danger zone (delete account).

forms.name: GuestShortenForm
forms.successBehavior: Show short URL inline with copy button; no redirect

forms.name: CreateLinkForm

validation.note: Custom slug — alphanumeric, dash, underscore only

forms.successBehavior: New link appears in table with copy button

authFlows.notes: JWT access token (15 min) + refresh token (7 days) stored in HttpOnly cookie. Sessions tracked in KV with TTL.
Immediate access after registration — no email verification in v1.
Silent refresh via HttpOnly cookie before access token expires.

externalTriggers.name: PublicRedirect
externalTriggers.triggerSource: Any visitor clicks a short link → GET /:code → KV lookup (cache hit, < 5ms) or D1 fallback → 301 redirect → enqueue click event to CF Queue
externalTriggers.expectedOutcome: Visitor redirected to destination URL; ClickEvent written to D1 asynchronously via Queue consumer

externalTriggers.name: ClickQueueConsumer
externalTriggers.triggerSource: CF Queue batch delivery → Worker consumer writes ClickEvent rows to D1
externalTriggers.expectedOutcome: ClickEvent persisted with geo (CF-IPCountry), device (UA parse), referrer, timestamp

assumptions: Public redirect endpoint (GET /:code) is the hot path — KV cache hit must be < 5ms; D1 fallback acceptable for cache misses (~20ms)
KV stores code→destination URL mapping with 1h TTL; invalidated on link toggle or delete
D1 (SQLite at edge) used for persistent data — users, links, click events, analytics summaries
CF Queue used for fire-and-forget click analytics — redirect returns 301 immediately; click is written asynchronously by Queue consumer
Analytics summaries pre-computed hourly by a CF Cron Trigger worker — raw ClickEvent table not queried directly by analytics API
Rate limiting on guest shorten endpoint (10 req/min per IP) and auth endpoints (10 req/15min) via Upstash REST API — no TCP Redis in Workers
IP address is used to extract country via CF-IPCountry header — raw IP not stored; only country code persisted
No compliance requirements — standard security baseline applies
Custom slugs validated for uniqueness at creation time — collision returns 409
Guest-shortened links are anonymous and expire after 30 days — authenticated links never expire
